prompt: A typographic illustration for 'Textual Graphics', showcasing various fonts arranged in the seated pose and composition layout of the reference image. Focus on Typography elements forming the figure.
prompt_refined: Generate a typographic illustration for 'Textual Graphics'. The illustration should feature a figure composed entirely of various fonts and text elements. This typographic figure must precisely replicate the seated pose and full-body composition of the woman in image 1, specifically her posture on the floor with one leg bent and the other extended. Every anatomical contour and feature of the figure, from head to limbs, must be exclusively formed by the strategic arrangement of typography.
objects: Figure with one leg bent (replicating image 1)
Figure with one leg extended (replicating image 1)
Head of the figure composed of typography
Limbs of the figure composed of typography
Anatomical contours of the figure formed by typography
Various fonts and text elements (forming the figure)
